content: Give me five emojis that represent the semantical meaning of "small" or "compressed" or "shortened"

Here are 5 emojis that represent small, compressed or shortened:

1. 👌 - OK hand gesture, implying small or little 
2. ⏰ - Timer emoji, implying short or compressed time
3. 📉 - Downward trend arrow, implying decrease or shortened
4. 🏃‍♀️ - Woman running emoji, implying fast pace or compressed
5. 🤏 - Pinching hand emoji, implying small amount or size

content: other synonyms for "semantic" or "semantics" when referring to language parts that carry meaning.

Here are some synonyms for "semantic" or "semantics" in the context of language:

• Meaning - relating to the meaning or meanings of words, phrases, sentences, etc.

• Sense - the meaning or interpretation of a word, sentence, etc.

• Significance - the meaning, importance or purpose of something.

• Purport - the meaning, import, or sense of something. 

• Implication - a possible meaning or interpretation of something.

• Connotation - an idea or feeling that a word invokes in addition to its literal or primary meaning.

• Nuance - a subtle difference or distinction in expression, meaning, response, etc.

• Denotation - the literal or primary meaning of a word, in contrast to the feelings or ideas that the word suggests.

• Reference - the actual thing, idea, etc. to which a word, phrase, or symbol refers.

• Gist - the essence or main point of something; the substance or general meaning.

• Import - meaning or significance, especially of a word, phrase, or action.

• Thrust - the central theme or main meaning of something.

• Tenor - the general meaning, sense, or purport of something.

• Drift - the general meaning, purport, or tendency of something.

So in summary, semantics relates to meaning, sense, significance, implication, connotation, nuance, reference, gist, import, thrust, tenor, drift, etc. - the aspects of language that convey meaning and purpose.
